index.title: Home
index.content:
Armand Mousavi
Welcome to my site.
About
Notes and experiments live here. Browse with the explorer, graph, or search in the sidebar.
Simulations
From the site home, try rhysics — small WASM physics demos.

lowercase-tap.title: lowercase tap
lowercase-tap.content:
im made of skeletal steel
a reel terrible teal
found of flesh on loan
aint no meal at home
hope a trout i catch
debone to a snatch
found keys i count
lowered as i tout

strudel-notes.title: notes with strudel
strudel-notes.content:
notes with strudel
Learning how to make some basic sounds for video games with the strudel repl:
strudel.cc/
a repl for making music with code in real time
First sounds
Use s("<sound-id>") for playing any sound like s("casio")

Add a number to play a specific sample in that sound like s("casio:2")

Drum sounds
